abstract.text: WWDCNotes is only possible thanks to these awesome volunteers! Contribute now to get listed here as well.
Here’s a full list of all 73 people who contributed to WWDCNotes – sorted by most contributions.
Swift Content Creator | Engineering Manager at Insulet | Formerly Meta and HP
Software engineer working on open source and enterprise mobile SDKs for iOS and macOS developers written in Swift
Session notes shared by the community for the community.
student at 42Berlin 🐬 | C & C++ | 🍎 Swift(UI) app dev  | speciality coffee ☕️ & cycling 🚴🏻‍♂️
Reveal a brilliant idea in a very mobile engineer way.
Hi 👋 I am Morten - I live in Denmark 🇩🇰
Spatial-first Indie Developer for  Platforms. Actively contributing to Open Source since 2011!
Co-Founder, Engineering @butter. Butter is a personal assistant that puts all of your company knowledge within reach.
iOS Engineer making my own apps
Grade school teacher turned iOS developer.
Software Development Manager for IQVIA’s Mobile team in Arizona.
iOS Developer - in love with SwiftUI
macOS UI, Frameworks, and Systems. Previously AppKit @ Apple
macOS EM @ Apple, Swift dev, Accessibility specialist – formerly Slack and Twitter.
Senior iOS Developer | Programming Mentor | Swift enthusiast
